COMPASSED. Nasabbu (compassed) is a nifal.

matches.lb: Liturgy: Siddur Sefard, Yotzerot, Parashat Zachor 5
matches.x: I will always make mention of the deeds which are remembered and kept in these days. The serpent that crept out from among the poisonous reptiles, his abhorring will I mention for fierce condemnation. The thorn that sprouted from briar and bramble rolled on and whirled from generation to generation. I will make mention of Esau, who by his wickedness made his father purblind; let not his sin…

12 That this also may be consecrated to the good of the church, to the poor and needy.

12. That this also may be consecrated to the good of the Church, to
 the poor and needy;
A good example would be Proverbs 31.20, there is no difference between poor and needy:
12 That this also may be consecrated to the good of the church, to the poor and needy.

12. That this also may be consecrated to the good of the Church, to
 the poor and needy;
A good example would be Proverbs 31.20, there is no difference between poor and needy:

And He said, Stretch not out thy hand upon the young man, neither do him any evil; for now it is manifest before Me that thou fearest the Lord; neither hast thou withheld thy son the only begotten from Me.

And He said, Stretch not out thy hand upon the young man, neither do him any evil; for now it is manifest before Me that thou fearest the Lord; neither hast thou withheld thy son the only begotten from Me.
